reviews.review_description:
👉webnetka*com 🇬🇧 🇫🇷 metaquest*forumactif*com👈
I just played 3-4 games and I find that the production is very good:
- I like the splash screen
- I like the design of the aliens and the giant side
- I really like the music on the menu)
The movements to be made are good and the blows delivered well

The reviews (devs!):
- afraid of getting bored quickly: not enough variety
- I haven't done the hard mode but the others are really easy... wouldn't it lack a bit of challenge?
- ergonomic defects:
When we play our first game, what difficulty are we actually in? (nothing is preselected)
Why button "resume" when we have just finished a game? is useless since the level is finished (a button to the next level would make more sense)
Clicking on the credits took me somewhere other than the credits
==================================
Pour échanger vos expériences et vos avis:
 👉 metaquest*forumactif*com 👈
Pour les promos quest : 👉 webnetka*com 👈

Its totally satisfying to hit as hard has you can and see the invaders explode. 
It feels a bit like Beat Saber with fists.
